targets.expr: sum by (carrier, ua_type, source_country, codec) (rate(sip_exporter_rtp_mos_score_sum{carrier=~"$carrier",ua_type=~"$ua_type",source_country=~"$source_country"}[5m])) / sum by (carrier, ua_type, source_country, codec) (rate(sip_exporter_rtp_mos_score_count{carrier=~"$carrier",ua_type=~"$ua_type",source_country=~"$source_country"}[5m]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, carrier, ua_type, source_country, codec) (rate(sip_exporter_rtp_jitter_milliseconds_bucket{carrier=~"$carrier",ua_type=~"$ua_type",source_country=~"$source_country"}[5m])))
